name: Memory Match

notes.en: Tap/click two cards to flip them and find a matching pair.
notes.ru: Тапни/кликни по двум карточкам, чтобы открыть их и найти пару.

notes: Classic concentration/pairs game. Three grid sizes (4x4/8 pairs, 6x4/12 pairs, 6x6/18 pairs) and four card themes (Shapes — plain CSS clip-path shapes in a 3-color rotation; Animals and Tiles — Unicode emoji / the games/mahjong Mahjong Tiles glyph block; Letters — plain bold text), each with 24 curated symbols so even the largest grid never runs short. No image assets anywhere. A round is rebuilt from scratch (fresh shuffle, fresh DOM grid) on every New game / Play again, so there's never leftover state between rounds. Board is a fixed logical-pixel grid, recomputed per grid size and scaled as a whole via CSS transform (games/solitaire's fitBoard() pattern) so it always fits without scrolling. Tracks moves and elapsed time, plus a local best-moves/best-time per grid size via OGHProfile. RTL (Arabic) mirrors header/setup/result chrome only; the card grid itself never mirrors (#board dir="ltr"), same precedent as games/solitaire and games/tic-tac-toe. Solo only — no networking, by design (see games/tic-tac-toe for this batch's LAN multiplayer example instead).
